title: UI Kit Accordions
description: Collapsible panels for organizing content sections

accordion.name: Accordion
accordion.description: Collapsible content panel with title and expandable body

recreationGuide.description: How to recreate accordions using text-to-figma tools
recreationGuide.step1_createFrame: const accordion = create_frame({ name: 'Accordion', layoutMode: 'VERTICAL', itemSpacing: 0, width: 390, horizontalSizing: 'FIXED' });
recreationGuide.step2_createHeader: const header = create_frame({ name: 'Header', parentId: accordion.frameId, layoutMode: 'HORIZONTAL', itemSpacing: 0, padding: 12, horizontalSizing: 'FILL', verticalSizing: 'HUG' }); set_fills({ nodeId: header.frameId, color: '#2A1139' }); set_stroke({ nodeId: header.frameId, strokeWeight: 1, strokeColor: '#3D1F50', strokeAlign: 'INSIDE' }); set_corner_radius({ nodeId: header.frameId, radius: 8 });
recreationGuide.step3_addTitle: const title = create_text({ content: 'Title of the accordion', parentId: header.frameId, fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 600, color: '#FFFFFF' }); set_layout_align({ nodeId: header.frameId, primaryAxis: 'SPACE_BETWEEN', counterAxis: 'CENTER' });
recreationGuide.step4_addIcon: // Icon instance with chevron/down - rotates 180° when expanded
recreationGuide.step5_createBody: const body = create_frame({ name: 'Body', parentId: accordion.frameId, layoutMode: 'VERTICAL', padding: 16, horizontalSizing: 'FILL', verticalSizing: 'HUG' }); set_fills({ nodeId: body.frameId, color: '#221134' }); const bodyText = create_text({ content: 'Body content goes here...', parentId: body.frameId, fontSize: 14, color: '#CEB6D8' }); set_visible({ nodeId: body.frameId, visible: false }); // Hidden by default
recreationGuide.step6_forExpanded: // For expanded state: set_visible({ nodeId: body.frameId, visible: true }); set_rotation({ nodeId: iconId, rotation: 180 });

usageExamples.faq: Frequently Asked Questions with collapsible answers
